title: Stachus #4720
definition:
Stachys = "a head of grain"

 1) a man with a Greek name, he is said to be one of the seventy
    disciples, and bishop of Byzantium (Gill)
nasbUsage:
Definition: Stachys = "a head of grain"

 1) a man with a Greek name, he is said to be one of the seventy
    disciples, and bishop of Byzantium (Gill)

    NASB:  Stachys, a Chr. at Rome:
